$dateStr = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd'

$backupDir = "D:\openclaw-backup-2026-03-20"
$dateStr = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd'
$branchName = "backups/$dateStr"
$githubToken = "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"
$repoUrl = "https://SUPPAN550:$githubToken@github.com/SUPPAN550/openclaw.git"

Set-Location $backupDir

# Initialize git repo
git init
git config user.email "backup@openclaw.local"
git config user.name "OpenClaw Backup"

# Add all files except node_modules and .git
git add .
git commit -m "OpenClaw backup $dateStr"

# Check if branch exists
$branchExists = git rev-parse --verify $branchName 2>$null
if ($branchExists) {
    Write-Host "Branch $branchName exists, checking out and updating..."
    git checkout -b $branchName 2>$null
    # Force update
    git push -u $repoUrl $branchName --force
} else {
    git branch -M $branchName
    git push -u $repoUrl $branchName
}

Write-Host "Git push exit code: $LASTEXITCODE"
